cards.jyutping: ngo5 giu3 zou6
cards.english: And this is my little brother George.

cards.jyutping: ji4 keoi5 zau6 hai6 ngo5 sai3 lou2
cards.english: This is Mummy Pig.

cards.jyutping: keoi5 zau6 hai6 zyu1 taai3 taai2
cards.english: This is Daddy Pig.

cards.jyutping: keoi5 hai6 zyu1 sin1 saang1
cards.english: I'm Peppa.

cards.jyutping: ngo5 hai6
cards.english: Peppa and George have been playing in the garden all this time.

cards.jyutping: san1 haai4
cards.english: Peppa, where are your shoes?

cards.characters: Peppa同George頭先一路喺花園度玩緊
cards.jyutping: tung4 tau4 sin1 jat1 lou6 hai2 faa1 jyun4 dou6 waan2 gan2
cards.english: I've lost them.

cards.jyutping: nei5 deoi3 haai4 ne1
cards.english: I'm sure you'll find them.

cards.jyutping: ngo5 ng5 gin3 zo2 aa3
cards.english: Why don't we try looking in the garden?

cards.jyutping: ngo5 nam2 nei5 jat1 ding6 wan3 dak1 faan1 ge3
cards.english: Okay!

cards.characters: 我哋不如試下喺花園度揾吖
cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 bat1 jyu4 si3 haa6 hai2 faa1 jyun4 dou6 wan2 aa1
cards.english: Everyone helps look for Peppa's shoes.

cards.jyutping: hou2 aa3
cards.english: Mummy Pig looks in the flowerbed,

cards.jyutping: daai6 gaa1 dou1 bong1 sau2 wan2 deoi3 haai4
cards.english: but Peppa's shoes aren't there.

cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 hai2 faa1 pou2 dou6 wan2
cards.english: Daddy Pig looks in the wheelbarrow.

cards.jyutping: bat1 gwo3 deoi3 haai4 m4 hai2 dou6
cards.english: Peppa's shoes aren't there either.

cards.characters: 豬先生就喺手推車入邊揾
cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 zau6 hai2 sau2 teoi1 ce1 jap6 bin6 wan2
cards.english: Peppa and George look inside the flowerpot.

cards.jyutping: deoi3 haai4 dou1 m4 hai2 dou6
cards.english: Peppa's shoes aren't in there either.

cards.jyutping: tung4 zau6 wan2 haa6 faa1 pun4 jap6 bin6
cards.english: We've looked everywhere,

cards.jyutping: deoi3 haai4 jik6 m4 hai2 jap6 bin6 wo3
cards.english: but we still can't find Peppa's shoes.

cards.jyutping: ngo5 dei6 wan2 gwo3 saai3 laa3
cards.english: Peppa's shoes are lost.

cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 dou1 wan2 m4 dou3 deoi3 haai4 wo3
cards.english: Now I have no shoes to wear.

cards.jyutping: deoi3 haai4 ng5 gin3 zo2 aa3
cards.english: Poor Peppa.

cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 ngo5 mou5 haai4 ho2 ji5 zoek6 laa3
cards.english: Actually your shoes were quite old anyway.

cards.jyutping: zan1 hai6 ho2 lin4 aa3
cards.english: I'll buy you a new pair.

cards.characters: 其實你對鞋都好舊㗎喇
cards.jyutping: kei4 sat6 nei5 deoi3 haai4 dou1 hou2 gau6 gaa4 laa3
cards.english: Can you buy a red pair, Mummy?

cards.jyutping: ngo5 maai5 gwo3 deoi3 bei2 nei5 laa1
cards.english: Of course, Peppa.

cards.characters: 可以買對紅色嘅鞋嘛？媽咪
cards.jyutping: ho2 ji5 maai5 deoi3 hung4 sik1 ge3 haai4 maa3 maa1 mi4
cards.english: George!

cards.jyutping: dong1 jin4 ho2 ji5 laa1
cards.english: I'm about to have a pair of new red shoes!

cards.characters: 我就快會有對新紅鞋喇
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zau6 faai3 wui6 jau5 deoi3 san1 hung4 haai4 laa3
cards.english: - Hello, Miss Rabbit. - Hello, Mummy Pig.

cards.characters: 豬太太同Peppa嚟到兔小姐間鞋舖
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 tung4 lai4 dou3 tou3 siu2 ze2 haan4 haai4 pou3
cards.english: I'd like to buy Peppa a new pair of shoes.

cards.jyutping: tou3 siu2 ze2 nei5 hou2 zyu1 taai3 taai2 nei5 hou2 aa3
cards.english: Red shoes.

cards.jyutping: ngo5 soeng2 bong1 maai5 deoi3 san1 haai4 aa3
cards.english: Let me find you the cutest pair, Peppa.

cards.jyutping: jiu3 hung4 sik1 haai4
cards.english: Red ones, please.

cards.characters: 等我幫你揾對最可愛嘅鞋啦，Peppa
cards.jyutping: dang2 ngo5 bong1 nei5 wan2 deoi3 zeoi3 ho2 oi3 ge3 haai4 laa1
cards.english: I know — red ones.

cards.jyutping: jiu3 hung4 sik1 ge3 m4 goi1
cards.english: New red shoes!

cards.jyutping: ngo5 zi1 dou3 laa3 hung4 sik1 aa1 maa3
cards.english: George and Daddy Pig are playing chess.

cards.jyutping: san1 hung4 haai4 aa3
cards.english: Good catch, George!

cards.jyutping: tung4 zyu1 sin1 saang1 hai2 dou6 zuk1 gan2 kei4
cards.english: Daddy...

cards.jyutping: zuk1 dak1 hou2 aa3
cards.english: Look at my new shoes!

cards.jyutping: de1 dei6
cards.english: They're red.

cards.jyutping: tai2 haa6 ngo5 deoi3 san1 haai4 aa3
cards.english: Oh yes.

cards.jyutping: hai6 hung4 sik1 gaa4
cards.english: New red shoes!

cards.jyutping: hai6 wo3
cards.english: Mummy, do you like my new shoes?

cards.jyutping: san1 hung4 haai4 wo3
cards.english: I do, Peppa.

cards.characters: 媽咪，你鍾意我對新鞋嘛？
cards.jyutping: maa1 mi4 nei5 zung1 ji3 ngo5 deoi3 san1 haai4 maa3
cards.english: You look very smart in them.

cards.jyutping: zung1 ji3 aa3
cards.english: George, do you like my new shoes?

cards.characters: 你着咗之後顯得好醒神吖
cards.jyutping: nei5 zoek6 zo2 zi1 hau6 hin2 dak1 hou2 sing2 san4 aa1
cards.english: Everyone loves Peppa's new shoes.

cards.jyutping: nei5 zung1 ji3 ngo5 deoi3 san1 haai4 maa3
cards.english: I really love my new shoes.

cards.characters: 大家都好鍾意Peppa對新鞋啊
cards.jyutping: daai6 gaa1 dou1 hou2 zung1 ji3 deoi3 san1 haai4 aa3
cards.english: I love them so much I don't want to take them off.

cards.characters: 我真係好鍾意我對新鞋啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zan1 hai6 hou2 zung1 ji3 ngo5 deoi3 san1 haai4 aa3
cards.english: Now it's bath time.

cards.characters: 我直頭鍾意到唔想除落嚟𠻹啊
cards.jyutping: ngo5 zik6 tau4 zung1 ji3 dou3 m4 soeng2 ceoi4 lok6 lai4 tim1 aa3
cards.english: Even in the bath, Peppa keeps her new shoes on.

cards.jyutping: ji4 gaa1 hai6 cung1 loeng4 si4 gaan3
cards.english: Peppa has changed into her pyjamas,

cards.characters: Peppa就算沖緊涼嗰陣，都着住對新鞋噃
cards.jyutping: zau6 syun3 cung1 gan2 loeng4 go2 zan6 dou1 zoek6 zyu6 deoi3 san1 haai4 bo3
cards.english: but is still wearing her new shoes.

cards.jyutping: ji5 ging1 wun6 zo2 seoi6 ji1
cards.english: Even when she sleeps, Peppa wants to keep her new shoes on.

cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 jing4 jin4 zoek6 zyu6 deoi3 san1 haai4
cards.english: Peppa, do you really not want to take off your new shoes?

cards.characters: Peppa就連瞓覺嗰陣，都要着住對新鞋啊
cards.jyutping: zau6 lin4 fan3 gaau3 go2 zan6 dou1 jiu3 zoek6 zyu6 deoi3 san1 haai4 aa3
cards.english: I never want to take off my new shoes, Mummy.

cards.characters: Peppa，你真係唔想除低你對新鞋呀？
cards.jyutping: nei5 zan1 hai6 m4 soeng2 ceoi4 dai1 nei5 deoi3 san1 haai4 aa1
cards.english: All right then. Good night, Peppa, George.

cards.characters: 我永遠都唔想除低我對新鞋啊，媽咪
cards.jyutping: ngo5 wing5 jyun5 dou1 m4 soeng2 ceoi4 dai1 ngo5 deoi3 san1 haai4 aa3 maa1 mi4
cards.english: Good morning... I mean, good night, Mummy.

cards.jyutping: gam2 hou2 laa1 zou2 tau4 laa3
cards.english: Good night, Daddy.

cards.jyutping: zou2 tau4 maa1 mi4
cards.english: Good night, my two darlings.

cards.jyutping: zou2 tau4
cards.english: It rained all night,

cards.jyutping: zou2 tau4 laa3 ngo5 loeng5 go3 bou2 bui3
cards.english: making the whole garden very wet.

cards.jyutping: gam1 maan5 jat1 zik6 hai2 dou6 lok6 gan2 jyu5
cards.english: Mummy Pig put on her rain boots.

cards.jyutping: ling6 dou3 sing4 go3 faa1 jyun4 dou1 hou2 sap1
cards.english: Daddy Pig put on his rain boots too.

cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 zoek6 zo2 seoi2 haai4
cards.english: George put on his rain boots too.

cards.jyutping: zyu1 sin1 saang1 jik6 dou1 zoek6 zo2 seoi2 haai4
cards.english: But Peppa is still wearing her new red shoes.

cards.jyutping: dou1 zoek6 zo2 seoi2 haai4
cards.english: George is playing in some wet grass.

cards.characters: 但係Peppa仍然着住佢嗰對新紅鞋
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 jing4 jin4 zoek6 zyu6 keoi5 go2 deoi3 san1 hung4 haai4
cards.english: Oh no.

cards.jyutping: hai2 di1 sap1 cou2 deoi1 jap6 min6 waan2
cards.english: Peppa also loves playing in the wet grass,

cards.jyutping: bai6 laa3
cards.english: but she doesn't want to get her new red shoes wet.

cards.jyutping: dou1 hou2 zung1 ji3 hai2 sap1 cou2 deoi1 waan2
cards.english: I can't play in the wet grass, George.

cards.characters: 但係佢唔想整濕佢對新紅鞋喎
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 keoi5 m4 soeng2 zing2 sap1 keoi5 deoi3 san1 hung4 haai4 wo3
cards.english: George loves jumping into the mud puddle.

cards.characters: 我唔可以喺濕草堆度玩喇，George
cards.jyutping: ngo5 m4 ho2 ji5 hai2 sap1 cou2 deoi1 dou6 waan2 laa3
cards.english: Peppa loves it just as much,

cards.jyutping: hou2 zung1 ji3 tiu3 lok6 nai4 tam5 dou6
cards.english: but she doesn't want to get her new red shoes dirty.

cards.jyutping: dou1 jat1 joeng6 hou2 zung1 ji3 gaa4
cards.english: Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig love jumping up and down in the mud puddle.

cards.characters: 但係佢唔想整污糟佢對新紅鞋啊
cards.jyutping: daan6 hai6 keoi5 m4 soeng2 zing2 wu1 zou1 keoi5 deoi3 san1 hung4 haai4 aa3
cards.english: Everyone loves jumping up and down in the mud puddle.

cards.characters: 豬太太同豬先生 都鍾意喺泥氹度跳上跳落
cards.jyutping: zyu1 taai3 taai2 tung4 zyu1 sin1 saang1 dou1 zung1 ji3 hai2 nai4 tam5 dou6 tiu3 soeng5 tiu3 lok6
cards.english: Where is Peppa going?

cards.characters: 大家都鍾意喺泥氹度跳上跳落
cards.jyutping: daai6 gaa1 dou1 zung1 ji3 hai2 nai4 tam5 dou6 tiu3 soeng5 tiu3 lok6
cards.english: It turns out Peppa is going to change into her rain boots.

cards.jyutping: jiu3 heoi3 bin1 dou6 ne1
cards.english: If you want to jump in the mud puddle, you have to wear rain boots.

cards.jyutping: jyun4 loi4 jiu3 wun6 seoi2 haai4 aa3
cards.english: It turns out Peppa is going to change into her boots.

cards.characters: 如果你要跳落泥氹度，就一定要着水鞋㗎
cards.jyutping: jyu4 gwo2 nei5 jiu3 tiu3 lok6 nai4 tam5 dou6 zau6 jat1 ding6 jiu3 zoek6 seoi2 haai4 gaa4
cards.english: If you want to jump up and down in muddy puddles, you must wear your boots.
